name: Cavendish - EB01-012 (Reprint)
effect_text: [On Play]/[When Attacking] If your Leader has the [Supernovas] type and you have no other [Cavendish] Characters, set up to 2 of your DON!! cards as active.Disclaimer: This card was reprinted from the original set with changes to the copyright information (Note: the original print did not include "EN" at the end of the copyright).
